EASTERN NORTH ATLANTIC.
MOROCCO.
WESTERN SAHARA.
GUNNERY.
DNC 01, DNC 08.
1. GUNNERY EXERCISES 010001Z FEB TO 312359 MAR
   WITHIN 20 MILES OF:
   A. 33-41N 008-03W
      BETWEEN 270 DEGREES AND 360 DEGREES.
   B. 29-53N 010-15W
      BETWEEN 270 DEGREES AND 360 DEGREES.
   C. 27-00N 013-50W
      BETWEEN 270 DEGREES AND 360 DEGREES.
   D. 23-35N 017-00W
      BETWEEN 270 DEGREES AND 360 DEGREES.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 010059Z APR 16.
